message:
fix(storage): track actually_enqueued in wbq_burst_200 stress test

The test accepted SkippedDiskCritical results but still asserted
enqueued_delta >= burst_count (200), which would fail if any ops were
skipped. Now tracks actually_enqueued like the other stress tests do.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
